_comment: R-064-6 portfolio demo burn-in config. Demo-only evidence generator; never targets T_Live and never toggles AutoTrading.
_decided_by: Claude 2026-06-01 (OWNER delegated). Rationale: window 42d (6wk) spans multiple regimes like the Kaspareit Beta phases without stalling deployment; dd_tolerance 1.5pp = small live-vs-backtest buffer over the Monte-Carlo p95 (mission DD is tight: 5% daily / 20% total); sharpe_band 1.0 absolute allows realistic forward Sharpe decay on a short window (e.g. backtest 2.4 -> live >=1.4 still strong); first_deployment_only so incremental sleeve changes go via the admission gate + re-fit (already evidence-based) without re-burning-in every time. INFRA STILL PENDING: a demo terminal must be provisioned at terminal_data_path and deploy_to_demo() implemented (currently a NotImplementedError stub) before a real burn-in can run.
